name: Joan Lunden's Bruschetta & Crostini
recipeIngredient: 1 Thin baguette or loaf of Italian bread (1/2-inch slice)
Nonstick olive or vegetable oil spray
recipeInstructions:
BRUSCHETTA-Prepare a grill or heat a grill pan and spray it with the oil. Arrange the bread 4 inches from the coals (or right on the grill) and toast for about 2 minutes per side, or until lightly browned.
CROSTINI-Rearrange the bread in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 10 minutes, or until golden.
TOPPING-In a nonstick pan, cook the onion over moderately low heat for 5 minutes, or until softened. Add the mushrooms and cook the mixture over moderate heat for 5 minutes, or until most of the liquid has evaporated. Stir in the thyme, sherry, and broth, then simmer until the mixture is reduced by half. Stir in the parsley or chives (if using), and season with salt and pepper to taste. Spoon a heaping teaspoon onto each bruschetta or crostini.
90 cal; 2 g fat; 20% fat.
Source: Joan Lunden's Healthy Cooking.
MM Waldine Van Geffen vghc42a.
